title: Cherry blossom walk
body: Took a long walk through the arboretum after my last lecture. The cherry blossoms finally peaked — petals drifting across the path like confetti. Sat on the stone bench by the pond and just watched the light change for twenty minutes.

title: Print studio session
body: Spent the afternoon at the printmaking lab working on my linocut series. The first two pulls were off-register, but the third came out perfectly. There’s something meditative about carving — the repetition clears my head.

title: Morning reset
body: Brewed loose-leaf oolong and opened every window. Spent an hour reading without checking my phone. The house finch that nests in the maple was singing again — I’m starting to recognize its call.
